All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

E

entry - Variable in class simulation.Controller
Arrival class is responsible for generating new customers and adding them to the event list.
Event - Class in simulation
Event class represents an event in the simulation, containing information about the time of the event, the type of event, and the customer involved.
Event(double, EventType, Customer) - Constructor for class simulation.Event
Creates an Event-instance.
eventList - Static variable in class simulation.Controller
EventList is a priority queue that holds events in the simulation in the required order.
EventList - Class in simulation
EventList is a priority queue that holds events in the simulation in the required order.
EventList() - Constructor for class simulation.EventList
Creates an empty EventList.
events - Variable in class simulation.EventList
A PriorityQueue that holds Event objects.
EventType - Enum Class in simulation
EventType is an enum that defines the different types of events that can occur in the simulation.
EventType() - Constructor for enum class simulation.EventType
